scripts.dev: npm run prisma:generate && node --watch --env-file=.env --import tsx src/index.ts
scripts.seed: npm run prisma:generate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.remove-seed-employees: npm run prisma:generate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx scripts/remove-seed-employees.ts
scripts.import-leave: npm run prisma:generate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx scripts/import-leave.ts
scripts.import-leave-prod: npm run prisma:generate && node --import tsx scripts/import-leave.ts scripts/leave-report-may.xlsx
scripts.ensure-dept-managers: npm run prisma:generate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx prisma/ensure-department-managers.ts
scripts.migrate-pro-onboarding: npm run prisma:generate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx prisma/migrate-pro-onboarding.ts
